description_long: This is a small, box-shaped safe with a weathered pink exterior, showing signs of rust and wear, suggesting prolonged outdoor or garage use. The front face features a rectangular opening with a cut-out section at the bottom, likely for depositing or retrieving items, and a small round button or lock mechanism to the right of the opening. The sides and top are solid, with no visible openings or handles, and the surface is marked by patches of rust and chipped paint. The interior appears hollow, with a dark, open cavity visible through the front. The safe's construction is primarily metal, giving it a sturdy and secure appearance, while the pink paint adds a distinctive, somewhat faded look. There are no visible brand markings, handles, or ventilation slots, and the hinges are not externally visible.
description: A small, weathered pink metal safe with a front rectangular opening and a round lock mechanism, showing rust and chipped paint. The box is solid on all other sides and has a hollow interior.
description_view_0: The front view shows a rectangular opening with a cut-out at the bottom and a round lock or button to the right, with visible rust and chipped paint.
description_view_1: The left side view is solid, with no openings or features, only weathered pink paint and rust patches.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the hollow interior through the open back, with the same weathered pink surface and rust spots.
description_view_3: The right side view is also solid, featuring only the pink, rusted surface with no openings or features.
attribute_ventilation_slots_or_openings: rectangular front opening with bottom cut-out; no other slots or perforations
